arts.ttl: John Eustace responds as former Arsenal man returns to Derby County 'family'
arts.sum: John Eustace says Derby County will be able to draw on Steve Round's "vast experience and knowledge" after his return to the club's coaching staff. Round has joined the club on a part-time basis until the end of the season after previously serving the Rams as a player and as assistant to Steve McClaren.

arts.ttl: “He won’t be cheap” – Agent of Millwall star speaks about potential exit
arts.sum: Mihailo Ivanovic has been key for Millwall in recent weeks. He has five goals in all competitions and three of those goals have come in the last six Championship games. As a result, he has started each of Millwall’s last ten games and is rising in stature, having joined the club from Vojvodina in the The post “He won’t be cheap” – Agent of Millwall star speaks about potential exit appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Derby County's relegation rivals, their next five fixtures and the verdict amid survival battle
arts.sum: New head coach John Eustace faces his first home game in charge today when they tackle Millwall at Pride Park as the Rams look to bounce back from a 4-0 defeat to QPR last Friday. Verdict: Pompey's home form has been decent and has largely been responsible as to why they have managed to climb out of the relegation zone.

arts.ttl: Sacked, clubless, return plotted - where every Derby County manager from the last 20 years is now - Derbyshire Live
arts.sum: While Derby awaited Clough's arrival, academy head coach Lowe took charge of one game, a 1-0 win over Manchester United in the League Cup semi-final. After being assistant to Jewell for a third time, he was appointed caretaker boss at Derby but his only match in charge was a 4-3 win over Forest Green Rovers in the FA Cup. Once the Rams appointed Nigel Clough, Hutchings left Pride Park.

arts.ttl: 'I took my girlfriend to West Ham vs Millwall on a first date – her dad wasn't pleased'
arts.sum: Opting for a first date at a heated West Ham vs Millwall clash turned out to be not the wisest decision made by one Hammers fan on a fateful August night in 2009

arts.ttl: Kemar Roofe shirt number revealed after Derby County transfer
arts.sum: Join our Derby County WhatsApp group to get the latest Rams headlines sent straight to your phone. Former Rangers striker Kemar Roofe has been handed the number nine shirt at Derby County after securing his move to Pride Park yesterday.

arts.ttl: Derby County fans plan fitting tribute to former goalkeeper after death aged 92
arts.sum: "There were many off the ground saves, The ball was punched by Joe, it went somewhere but not the goal." The end of season game that followed retained Sharman in goal against Sheffield Wednesday, marking his second and final appearance for the club. He kept a clean sheet against a strong Chelsea side at the time, with a local match report reading: "Joe accepted his chance to debut in first league football with both hands and played a spectacular game.

arts.ttl: Derby County hero explains what's next after hanging up his boots
arts.sum: Former Derby County striker Martyn Waghorn would like to eventually move into coaching after calling time on his career. Join our Derby County WhatsApp group to get the latest Rams headlines sent straight to your phone.

arts.ttl: Bromley boss has no imminent plans to replace ex-Millwall man Alan Dunne in backroom team
arts.sum: Andy Woodman has no plans to replace Alan Dunne until the end of the season out of respect for the former Bromley assistant manager. “It was pretty much like every other time we are trying to find players,” said the former Crystal Palace goalkeeping coach.

arts.ttl: John Eustace Derby County deal given massive thumbs up amid 'magic' Dwight Gayle verdict
arts.sum: Derby will hope Roofe can have the same kind of impact as Dwight Gayle did last season when the former Newcastle forward arrived on a similar deal after the transfer window closed. And with the Rams in desperate need of goals to aid their survival fight, readers of DerbyshireLive have been having their say on Roofe's arrival with the former Rangers forward having plenty of Championship experience at Leeds.
